_meta.pit_note: financials gated to ann_date <= as_of - 1d (cutoff 20260525); latest announced version kept per fiscal period. max_ann_date_used proves no look-ahead.
_meta.layer: screen_queue (attention ranking; NOT thesis, NOT capital)
_meta.max_available_weight_note: usually 60 (40 scored + 20 catalyst-proxy if a FUTURE mandatory disclosure deadline exists); renormalized to 0-100. expectation_revision(25) + coverage_gap(15) are unavailable full-market and renormalized OUT — screen_score is NOT full-fidelity alpha. attention_inflection is an UNSCORED diagnostic.
_meta.renormalization_caveat: 0/50 queue names have available_weight<60 (per-name missing catalyst). Per Junyan decision-2 these are renormalized over their available weight, which can FLOAT a data-incomplete name above fuller-data names when the missing component is near-average. available_weight is on every row so this is auditable. OPEN: median-impute vs availability-tiered ranking is a v0.1 decision for Junyan.
_meta.action_note: RUN_THESIS (top tier) = worth producing a forward-validatable thesis to TEST, NOT an endorsement; WATCH_DATA = in queue but lower priority; SKIP = below queue.
